label: 138_spillovers_unconventional monetary_unconventional_international spillovers
description: The Federal Reserve and other institutions examined how monetary policies in one country affect others, emphasizing the need for global cooperation to enhance international financial stability. These discussions highlighted the challenges and potential benefits of managing cross-border economic impacts.
